ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale or region of the data entry */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code representing the geographic area */,
  "value_percent" REAL /* Percentage value representing the poverty rate */,
  "families_below_poverty" INTEGER /* Number of families below the poverty line */,
  "rank_within_us" TEXT /* Rank of the region within the US based on poverty rate */,
  "age_group" INTEGER /* Age group being represented */,
  "areatype" TEXT /* Type of area (state or county) */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Race category of the demographic */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex category of the demographic */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* Source URL for the data */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the data (e.g., poverty) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collection (e.g., census data) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "income_level" REAL /* Average income level for the demographic */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the demographic */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, not in labor force) */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status (e.g., owned, rented, homeless) */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the demographic has health insurance */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate for the demographic */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex_categories ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_fips_code FOREIGN KEY ("fips_code") REFERENCES locations ("fips_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES race_categories ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_source_url FOREIGN KEY ("source_url") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Name of the locale or region */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Overall poverty rate of the location */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty statistic entry */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic entry */,
  "population_below_poverty" INTEGER /* Number of people living below the poverty line */,
  "population_below_150pov" INTEGER /* Number of people living below 150% of the poverty line */,
  "median_income_below_poverty" REAL /* Median income of those below the poverty line */,
  "poverty_rate_change" REAL /* Change in poverty rate over the previous year */,
  "poverty_rate_150pov_change" REAL /* Change in the rate of those below 150% of the poverty line over the previous year */,
  "child_poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for children (0-17) */,
  "adult_poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for adults (18-64) */,
  "senior_poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for seniors (65+) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_statistics_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of age for the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income for the age group */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the age group */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels within the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition or description of the race category */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population within the race category */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income for the race category */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the race category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_categories" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population within the sex category */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income for the sex category */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., poverty, health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the topic covers */,
  "related_topics" TEXT /* List of related topics */,
  "importance_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the importance of the topic in poverty analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic or demographic coverage of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic dataset accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and operating system) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user uploading the data */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic dataset being uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the upload event */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the uploaded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Path to the report data */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and categorization */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
